content_body:
"This cabin is so beautiful! This is the couple's cabin of all cabins..we had a total of 5 couples in this all king bed beauty! The view was breathtaking! This is our second time coming to this cabin and it did not disappoint us! The ladies at Cabin Rentals were so sweet, nice and accommodating.  We will definitely rent with them again!! Again it was great!"
-Veronica
title: Great Couple's Getaway
